title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mapei India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Mapei India
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!
